title: Hornet Removal in Mill Basin, Brooklyn | $350 – $550
metaDescription: Professional hornet removal services in Mill Basin, Brooklyn. Safe, effective nest elimination for $350 – $550. Servicing homes near Mill Basin Marina and Old Mill Creek.
intro: Mill Basin residents face unique hornet challenges due to the neighborhood's proximity to Mill Basin Marina and abundance of waterfront properties with mature trees. Our professional hornet removal services protect your family and property from aggressive hornets that nest in eaves, attics, and outdoor structures. Best Pest Control NYC provides safe, effective hornet elimination throughout Mill Basin's residential streets and canal-side homes.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC specializes in hornet removal for Mill Basin's unique mix of single-family homes, waterfront properties, and garden-rich yards. Our experienced technicians use safe, proven methods to eliminate hornet nests while protecting your family, pets, and the beautiful landscaping that makes Mill Basin special.
localContext: Mill Basin's tree-lined streets, proximity to Jamaica Bay, and well-maintained gardens create ideal conditions for hornet nesting, particularly in areas near the Mill Basin Inlet and along Avenue U. The neighborhood's many two-story homes with attics and detached garages provide numerous potential nesting sites that require professional attention.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove a hornet nest in Mill Basin?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day and next-day hornet removal services throughout Mill Basin. Our technicians can typically eliminate most hornet nests within 1-2 hours, though larger nests or difficult locations may require additional time. We service all areas from National Drive to the Mill Basin Marina.

faqs.question: What's included in the $350 – $550 hornet removal price?
faqs.answer: Our hornet removal service includes complete inspection, safe nest elimination using professional-grade products, removal of accessible nests, and a follow-up visit if needed. Pricing varies based on nest size, location accessibility, and height. Most Mill Basin homes fall within this range for standard hornet removal.

faqs.question: Are hornets common near Mill Basin's waterfront areas?
faqs.answer: Yes, hornets thrive in Mill Basin due to the abundance of water sources from the marina and inlet, plus mature trees and landscaping. Waterfront properties along the canals are particularly susceptible to hornet activity, especially during summer months when colonies are most active.

faqs.question: Is hornet removal safe for my family and pets?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We use targeted treatments that eliminate hornets while minimizing risk to your family, pets, and Mill Basin's environment. Our technicians are trained in safe application methods, and we provide clear instructions for re-entry. We take extra care in Mill Basin's residential neighborhoods where children and pets are present.
